message:
feat(tui): improve Unicode rendering, analytics theming, search latency tracking, and thread list summary

Action menu Unicode safety:
- Replace character-index column positioning with display-width-aware
  advancement in ActionMenu::render(), correctly handling CJK and other
  wide glyphs that occupy multiple terminal columns
- Fill trailing cells of wide characters with consistently-styled spacers
- Fix trailing background fill to use actual rendered width instead of
  pre-computed text width

Analytics screen theming:
- Extract analytics_table_backgrounds() helper using panel_bg and
  bg_surface lerping with light/dark surface detection via perceived_luma()
- Replace hardcoded bg_deep/bg_overlay color mixing with theme-derived
  table backgrounds for better contrast across themes
- Tint non-selected row backgrounds with severity color (7% mix)
- Switch selected row to selection_fg/selection_bg with bold instead of
  severity-colored selection
- Use panel_border_focused/panel_border_dim for card list and detail
  borders instead of selection_fg/panel_border
- Apply theme text styles (text_primary, text_section, text_success) to
  card detail content including headline, rationale, next steps, trends,
  and correlations
- Add split layout for detail area: 62% main detail + runtime viz
  fallback panel when terminal height >= 18 and width >= 52

Search improvements:
- Add display-width-aware truncate_display_width() function that respects
  multi-byte character boundaries and appends ellipsis correctly
- Replace truncate_str() with truncate_display_width() for result titles,
  snippets, and thread panel titles
- Add last_search_ms field tracking per-query execution latency
- Display sql row count and latency in search cockpit status chips
- Reduce DEBOUNCE_TICKS from 2 to 1 for more responsive search-as-you-type

Thread list enrichment:
- Add summary footer showing selected thread ID, total unread count,
  escalation count, and average velocity
- Add participant line showing current thread's participant_names
  (display-width-truncated to available terminal width)

Cargo.lock:
- Updated lockfile reflecting toml 1.0.2 (spec 1.1.0) and safetensors
  0.7.0 dependency resolution changes from upstream workspace

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
